greengrass.groupversion.ConnectorDefinit.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connector definition version that contains the connectors you want to deploy with the group version.

greengrass.groupversion.CoreDefinitionVe.Docs: The ARN of the core definition version that contains the core you want to deploy with the group version. Currently, the core definition version can contain only one core.

greengrass.groupversion.DeviceDefinition.Docs: The ARN of the device definition version that contains the devices you want to deploy with the group version.

greengrass.groupversion.FunctionDefiniti.Docs: The ARN of the function definition version that contains the functions you want to deploy with the group version.

greengrass.groupversion.GroupId.Docs: The ID of the group associated with this version. This value is a GUID.

greengrass.groupversion.LoggerDefinition.Docs: The ARN of the logger definition version that contains the loggers you want to deploy with the group version.

greengrass.groupversion.ResourceDefiniti.Docs: The ARN of the resource definition version that contains the resources you want to deploy with the group version.

greengrass.groupversion.SubscriptionDefi.Docs: The ARN of the subscription definition version that contains the subscriptions you want to deploy with the group version.
